zh.lifeSummary: 當Baldwin Malet於大約1349年出生在英國薩默塞特時，他的父親John Malet27歲，母親Elizabeth de Kingston25歲。他於大約1369年與Elizabeth Trivet結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1400年被列為justice of the peace of somerset。他去世於1416年在英國薩默塞特享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: Malet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname from a diminutive of Mal ‘bad’ or from a derivative of the related Old French word maleit ‘accursed’ (see Mallet 1). Compare Malette .
French: from the Old French personal name Malet, a pet form of Malo (compare Mallet 2).

variants.name: Mal
meanings: Slovenian: nickname for a physically small man, from mal ‘small, little’.

variants.name: Malette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Alphonse, Francois, Jacques, Rejean, Serge.
French: variant or feminine form of Malet and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this, reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Baldwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from bald ‘bold, brave’ + wine ‘friend’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In the Middle Ages it was a comparatively common name, which gave rise to a surname. It was borne by the Norman crusader Baldwin of Boulogne, who in 1100 was elected first king of Jerusalem, and by four further crusader kings of Jerusalem. It continued to be used by some families in England into the 17th century, but in modern times it normally represents a transferred use of the surname rather than a direct revival of the Norman given name.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Baldwin Malet was born about 1349, in Somerset, England, his father, John Malet, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth de Kingston, was 25. He married Elizabeth Trivet about 1369. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. In 1400, his occupation is listed as justice of the peace of somerset. He died in 1416, in Somerset, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baldwin Malet est né environ 1349, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John Malet, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Kingston, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Trivet environ 1369. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. En 1400, sa profession de son indiquée est justice of the peace of somerset. Il est décédé en 1416, à Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Baldwin Malet(이)가 대략 1349년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Malet(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Kingston(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1369년 Elizabeth Trivet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1400년, 그의 직업은 justice of the peace of somerset이었다. 그는 1416년 영국 서머세트에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Trivet aproximadamente 1369. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1400, sua profissão aparece como justice of the peace of somerset. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baldwin Malet родился около 1349 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Malet было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Kingston, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Trivet около 1369 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. В 1400 году он работал по профессии justice of the peace of somerset. Он умер в 1416 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.
